message:
fix(multi-town): migrate remaining tmux callsites to socket-aware API

PR #1957 missed 3 doctor/ callsites and the feed TUI attach decision.
These would query the default tmux server instead of the town socket,
causing gt doctor to miss sessions and feed attach to fail cross-socket.

- doctor/tmux_check.go: list-panes via tmux.BuildCommand
- doctor/orphan_check.go: list-panes via tmux.BuildCommand
- doctor/theme_check.go: show-options via tmux.BuildCommand
- tui/feed/model.go: os.Getenv(TMUX) to tmux.IsInSameSocket()
- tmux/tmux.go: add exported IsInSameSocket() for cross-package use
- cmd/helpers.go: delegate isInSameTmuxSocket() to tmux.IsInSameSocket()
- polecat/manager.go: restore os/exec import removed by PR #1957

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
